title: A deep conversation
setting: Over coffee, a thoughtful friend asks you a big, open-ended question. This is about expressing ideas with nuance.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.es: ¿Vos creés que la gente cambia de verdad?
steps.en: Do you think people really change?

options.es: Creo que cambiamos, pero la esencia permanece.
options.en: I think we change, but the essence remains.
options.feedback: Nuanced and balanced — holding two ideas at once is exactly C1-level thought.
A one-word answer wastes a rich question. This is the level where you develop ideas.

options.es: Depende de la persona y las circunstancias.
options.en: It depends on the person and circumstances.
options.feedback: Thoughtful hedging — acknowledging complexity is sophisticated and honest.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.en: Interesting. And you, have you changed a lot?

options.es: Más de lo que habría imaginado al llegar.
options.en: More than I would have imagined when I arrived.
options.feedback: Conditional perfect ('habría imaginado') used naturally — elegant and precise.
True but thin. At this level, reach for the texture behind the answer.

options.es: El idioma me transformó por dentro, no solo la lengua.
options.en: The language transformed me inside, not just my speech.
options.feedback: Beautiful and reflective — a genuinely C1 way to express depth.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.en: In what sense did it transform you?

options.es: Aprender a pensar distinto me hizo ver el mundo distinto.
options.en: Learning to think differently made me see the world differently.
options.feedback: Articulate cause-and-effect on an abstract idea. This is real eloquence.
Honest, but you can — push a little. Even 'it's hard to put in words, but...' invites you to try.

options.es: Me dio otra forma de ser yo mismo.
options.en: It gave me another way of being myself.
options.feedback: Poetic and precise — a lovely, layered thought delivered cleanly.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.es: Qué manera tan linda de decirlo.
steps.en: What a beautiful way to put it.

options.es: Es que vos sacás lo mejor de mis pensamientos.
options.en: It's that you bring out the best in my thoughts.
options.feedback: Warm, gracious, and a little tender — closing an abstract talk on a human note. Perfect.

options.es: Gracias. Me gusta pensar en voz alta con vos.
options.en: Thanks. I like thinking out loud with you.
options.feedback: Sincere and natural — acknowledges the joy of the conversation itself.

options.en: Well, it's not a big deal.
options.feedback: Deflecting a genuine compliment dampens the moment. Receive it warmly.
